allow: PowerShell($conns = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 5173 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($conns\) { $conns | Select-Object -ExpandProperty OwningProcess -Unique | ForEach-Object { Get-Process -Id $_ | Select-Object Id, ProcessName, Path } } else { "No process is listening on port 5173" })
